regolith_model.note: Cut-depth albedo = (M0 - mass_areal)/surface_density. maturity_albedo_ratio is a SOURCED fresh/mature reflectance ratio (OMAT/Lucey; Hapke 2001), conservative 1.4. Outcome caveats (fluffing/clods/dust re-settle) NOT modeled -- this is a first-order maturity hypothesis. See script docstring.

notes: crater_boulders WORKED: same base, driven path (tracks throughout) + a drum trench over the middle leg (spoil ridge). 143 clasts (rover passes through; no contact modeled). Mass conserved through the drum inventory.
